messages.content:
Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

A vulnerability was found in PeterMu nodebatis up to 2.1.x. It has been classified as critical. Affected is an unknown function. The manipulation leads to sql injection. Upgrading to version 2.2.0 is able to address this issue. The patch is identified as 6629ff5b7e3d62ad8319007a54589ec1f62c7c35. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component. VDB-217554 is the identifier assigned to this vulnerability.

A critical vulnerability has been identified in PeterMu nodebatis versions up to 2.1.x. This flaw is due to an unspecified function that can be manipulated, leading to SQL injection. Users are advised to upgrade to version 2.2.0 to mitigate this risk. The patch addressing this issue is referenced by the ID 6629ff5b7e3d62ad8319007a54589ec1f62c7c35. The vulnerability is tracked as VDB-217554.
